_comment: Durable record of every personalbook role imported into /journey/roles/. One entry per role. Blog-side ONLY (personalbook is never mutated). excluded_files is the auditable privacy trail: which private artifacts the importer deliberately left behind. See SKILL.md.

spun_off_posts.note: Pre-existing framework post; the role doc links to it. Left as-is.

excluded_files: artifacts/*.md bodies (personal application: dated todos, private URLs)
artifacts/aliases.md (folded into 'Role evolution' as summary only)
